policyname: Users can view badges of visible profiles
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = badges.user_id) AND ((profiles.profile_visibility = 'public'::text) OR ((profiles.profile_visibility = 'friends'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM friendships
          WHERE (((friendships.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (friendships.friend_id = profiles.id) AND (friendships.status = 'accepted'::text)) OR ((friendships.friend_id = auth.uid()) AND (friendships.user_id = profiles.id) AND (friendships.status = 'accepted'::text))))))) AND (profiles.show_badges = true))))

policyname: Users can view their own badges
Users can manage their own blocked list
Users can delete own event views
Users can insert own event views
Users can view own event views
Cannot create friendships with blocked users
with_check:
(NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM blocked_users
  WHERE (((blocked_users.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (blocked_users.blocked_user_id = friendships.friend_id)) OR ((blocked_users.user_id = friendships.friend_id) AND (blocked_users.blocked_user_id = auth.uid()))))))

policyname: Users can create friendships
Users can delete own friendships
Users can update own friendships
Users can view friendships they're part of
Group admins can add members
with_check:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM group_members group_members_1
  WHERE ((group_members_1.group_id = group_members_1.group_id) AND (group_members_1.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (group_members_1.role = 'admin'::text)))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM groups
  WHERE ((groups.id = group_members.group_id) AND (groups.owner_id = auth.uid())))))

policyname: Group admins can remove members
qual:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM group_members group_members_1
  WHERE ((group_members_1.group_id = group_members_1.group_id) AND (group_members_1.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (group_members_1.role = 'admin'::text)))) OR (auth.uid() = user_id))

policyname: Users can view group members of groups they're in
Group owners can delete their groups
Group owners can update their groups
Users can create groups
Users can view groups they're part of
Creators can delete invites
Creators can insert invites
Invitees and creators can update invites
Users can view related hangout invites
Creators can delete their own hangouts
Creators can update their own hangouts
Users can create their own hangouts
Users can view related hangouts
qual: (((is_public = true) AND (status = 'confirmed'::text)) OR (created_by = auth.uid()) OR is_hangout_invitee(id, auth.uid()))

policyname: Users can delete their own memories
Users can insert their own memories
Users can update their own memories
Users can view memories of visible profiles
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = memories.user_id) AND ((profiles.profile_visibility = 'public'::text) OR ((profiles.profile_visibility = 'friends'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM friendships
          WHERE (((friendships.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (friendships.friend_id = profiles.id) AND (friendships.status = 'accepted'::text)) OR ((friendships.friend_id = auth.uid()) AND (friendships.user_id = profiles.id) AND (friendships.status = 'accepted'::text))))))) AND (profiles.show_memories = true))))

policyname: Users can view their own memories
Authenticated users can view all profiles

Users can update own profile
